node.text: Rajab Butt has sparked curiosity among fans after teasing, “Be ready for 2 vlogs tonight,” just as he and his family shared warm Eid Mubarak wishes with their followers.
Mrd km khusro zyada
Pata nahi log follow deen ki content ko nahi karte jitna aise logo ko karte hai afsos 🙌
ngaf
Tobaaa hum sab kitne invested hain is family k drame me
Hum to nahi hai
Sahi kha.
not all
Bs raha nh jata YouTube k beghairc😂😂😂 pesy kahan sy ayiengy😂
Lanti zani family
Inko dekhny waly bhe be gherat hen🙌
@ubaidalikhan2023  lekn post dekh krcomment ap jesey krney atey to phr khud ka b koi socho title k khud ks lowest level k ho 🤭🤭
Afsos h Jo log ab b isko dekhty hn
Unfollow done
😂chotiay he follow kartay is ko
hud ho gai jitna social media per mey ignore kr rahi inko ye utna mou outha k ajetey tauabha
Bus krdo is baigairt ko daikhna.....
Yehi news hai tere pass sirf
Ab ye chutiyon ka peyooo naaayaaaaa publicity stunt mare ga 😂
People do even care??? Kitna farig time hai logon k pas
Is khandaan KO social media say hata do bae 🙏🏻 why so much drama
Jis page per tum jasey kanjar ay wo b block
Rajab pasy deta hai @fhmpakistan  kooo
@fhmpakistan I'm going unfollow this page. Isk pas is jahil ke ilawa koi new nhi hai🖕🏻
@shakeelbuttofficial  to ap k unfollow krney se kya hoga . By the way who are you 🤭🤭
Sahi bat hai. Jb tak ap jese log inko follow karenge ye apni maa behan apko dekhaty rahege. Carry on bro

@shakeelbuttofficial  mehdud soch bss ma behn ko dikhaney pr atki he . Bat  kya ho rai aur esy dimag srf soch kya sktey . Arz ki thi k muslim ho to aeteqad hoga k rizq  izat o aulad etc Allah aur bndey k muamlat hen . Ap jesey ek unknown insan k unfollow krney se kya hoga but ap jesey mehdud soch k logo ki  tmash been soch bs ma behne dikhaney tk mehdud he . Dusro pr judgmental bnney ki bjaye apni koi worth bnao k ap k follow unfollow krney se ksi ko farq b parhey. Fazul ...
Plz guys unfollow this page @fhmpakistan
Allah krey inki sulah hohye
